name: Erich von Lergen
alt_names: エーリッヒ・フォン・レルゲン
description: A high-ranking officer in the Empire's Military Command, belonging to Strategic Headquarter. He is part of the General Staff's strategic advisory member that deals with the Empire's war tactics. A thoughtful and keen man, he quickly deduces the true nature of Tanya Degurechaff, calling her a demon. Even so, he trusts her ruthless efficiency to carry out tasks perfectly.
